string 2:
I have to go report to Merukimon,
so I can't go with you this time.

I'm not worried, though. You guys will be
just fine without me. We're counting on you!

Just take Locomon and you'll reach the
Abyss Area in no time.

We've been verifying the information you sent me,
and as I mentioned, we've come up with a theory.

The unsolved cases ADAMAS has been keeping track of...
We feel the majority of them may have been caused by Digimon.

Urban legends, folklore, myths... All presumably derived from 
the words of those who returned from the Digital World.

If Dr. Yuki, were alive... I have to wonder how he would
view all this. There's one thing I can say for sure, though.

Your investigation will reveal the truth of this world, and may 
help us find a solution to the crisis in eight years.

Realistically, believing that to be true is our only option.
I'm counting on you, Agent {player}.
So... I really am this "Great Guardian"...

I wouldn't worry about it too much.
You're still Aegiomon. That much hasn't changed.

Yeah... I mean, it threw me for a loop at first, but it's not
like I hate the idea.
I always had to hide myself in the human world.
I even scared my friends...
But here, well... I don't have to worry about that kind of thing...
The people in this world need me.
...I'm sorry life in the human world was so hard for you.
Oh! No, I wasn't trying to say that...!

A-Anyway, the gate to the human world won't open until this world
is at peace again, right?
Everyone will be happy once peace returns.{next}
Let's do as Junomon says so we can return to Shinjuku.{next}
Sounds like a lot of trouble just to open a gate.{next}
Yeah, that's right.
...Yeah.
Hee hee! It kind of does, doesn't it?
Still, the important stuff usually is.
Aegiomon... Once all this is over...
...and the gate opens up... what do you think you'll...?
...No, never mind. Sorry. Forget I said anything.

Come on. Time to get going. First things first. Let's head
for that ocean site!
So this is the Ocean Village...

They haven't suffered any damage from the Titans yet, from 
the looks of things.
We should go learn more about what's going on.
Hello? Anybody here?
Is it locked? Maybe no one's home.
[Knock on the door.]{next}
[Try shouting.]{next}
[Don't do anything.]{end}
...Wh-Who is that?
What do you want from me?

The other villagers are worried. They want to know what
you're doing holed up at home all the time.
T-Tell them I'm hurt.
Th-That's why I can't leave my house.

An injury so bad you can't leave the house...? Are you
okay? Did anyone take a look at it?
W-Well, no...

Look. I know what they say about me... but
t-that's all a misunderstanding.
I really am hurt... and I don't have the medicine I need either.
I'm not lying. H-Honest...
I believe her. I... don't think this Digimon is lying.
I feel the same way.{next}
What makes you think that?{next}
You know what they say, "Only a fool believes."{next}
I mean... no particular reason.
It's more of a gut feeling. Is that not enough?
Hmm. Yeah, you might be right. Still...

I just can't for the life of me think that she's lying. Can...
we really not trust her?

If it's medicine you need, we'll bring it to you. Where can we
get some?
...Thank you.

If I had some Coveweed, I could make an ointment... There's
usually some down at the shore.
Please, I'm begging you...
Shellmon, can you hear me? We brought your medicine.
...We'll leave it at the door.

And we'll let everyone know this was all just one
big misunderstanding.
H-Hold on!
How come you're so nice to me? We only just met, after all.
What do we need a reason for?
I mean, you're right here, and you're hurt. Isn't it normal to care?
You don't need... a reason...?
Then you're the same as me.
Come inside. To you folks... I think I can explain the whole story.
No way... A Titan?!
Oh, no! So the rumors were true after all?!
W-Wait, please! Just hear me out!
This is Divermon. He doesn't want to fight anymore. Don't worry.

It's true that he came to attack the village, but he was
just following orders.
Whoa, really? Still, even if that's true...
...if the other villagers hear about this...
Yeah, I doubt they'd let it slide...

But it's just like you said, right? You don't need a reason to care
about someone when they're hurt.

Apparently, Divermon had been fighting some friends of mine
that were defending our village...

...and I happened to come along afterward, when he was hurt
and couldn't move anymore.
...I'm real sorry about all this.
You don't have to be. I just did what I felt was right.
So you've been nursing Divermon back to health this whole time?
And that's why you couldn't leave your house?
That's right. I can't leave him alone when he's hurt.
That's why I'm so grateful to you guys for bringing the medicine.

I couldn't talk to anyone else about this, you see, so really...
Thank you.
...You're a good Digimon, you know that?
Now that we've heard the whole story, we can't just leave and do nothing.

You've been looking after Divermon this whole time without
a break, right?

If you keep this up, Shellmon, you'll be the one who needs to be
looked after.

So why don't you take a breather? We'll take care of things
here for you.
*knocking*
Hey, Shellmon! You're in there, aren't you?!
It's an emergency! You've gotta open the door!
It's one of the villagers! Wh-What should I do?
Negotiations are part of an Agent's job...!{next}
[Proceed cautiously without opening the door.]{next}
[Open the door and let the villager inside.]{next}
Leave this to us! We'll ask what the trouble is!

At the very least, let's see whats going on? Sounds like
something bad is happening.
Hey, don't just answer it!
Um, Shellmon's hurt right now and can't come out...
What?! Is Shellmon okay?!

But there's no time for that now...! It's the village!
The village is in trouble!

It's a Titan attack! You've gotta get out of there,
and I mean right now! That goes for all of you!

I'm off to go find a place to hide! I just stopped by
to pass the word along. Good luck!
Wh-What should we do?!
We'd better go back to the village! You two stay here, Shellmon!
We're too late...
It's awful... How could they do such horrible things?

I hope there are at least some Digimon that are still
okay...

War creates the same tragedies everywhere. The words of that Digimon
who oversees the gate, Junomon, have stuck with me.

Our world has been in a terrible state ever since the
Shinjuku Inferno, too.

What that Digimon who oversees the gate, Junomon, said back
there has been weighing on my mind.

It sounded to me like the Digital World and human world affect
each other pretty closely.

If so, then the similarity between what you see now and the gruesome event
in the human world eight years later...

...may not be a simple coincidence. You need to keep that
in mind as you investigate the area.

Keep that in mind as you investigate the area. I'll do
everything I can to analyze the data on this end.
Wow... I can't believe it...

This makes your current situation even more difficult
to explain...

You're right... It'll be harder than ever for them
to understand now...
Hey, wait! Where are you going?!

The pain is gone, thanks to the medicine, so I'll head back
home now.

You've already done so much for me. I can't stand to be
a burden to you any longer.
But you couldn't even move yesterday! You shouldn't be up!
I don't think you should be out of bed, either.
This is the first time in my life anyone's been so kind to me.
I really misjudged all of you.
We Titans are the ones in the wrong. I'll talk to the boss.
B-But...
I have to do this. You can't stop me.
In that case, why don't we come with you?
We could help you out if anything goes wrong, Divermon.

If we can all talk and convince the Titans to stop, that
would be the best thing for all of us.

Wouldn't you feel better, too, if we went with
Divermon, Shellmon?
Definitely.
I'd also love to go with you, but I don't think I'd be too useful.
At the very least, take this.
The Titans set up shop at the bottom of the ocean, right?

If you blow this conch on the shore, my best friend will
come and help you.

Blow the conch near the small island by the cliff wall. Then my friend
can take you where you need to go.
Do take of yourselves...
Thank you. I'll never forget this.
And I promise to return the favor someday.
Okay, let's head to the shore. The small island by the cliff wall, right?

This is the place Shellmon told you about. Do
you want to blow the conch?
[Blow the conch.]
[Don't use the conch yet.]
Whaaale...!

Whale, whale, whale... Who might you be? Is it safe to assume
you're Shellmon's friends, since you have the conch?
Yes, we're her friends.{next}
Our identities are classified.{next}
Friends of a friend are friends, right?{next}
Whale! I knew it!
Whale, is that so? But you do have the conch...

Good point. I see that conch, and, whale, that's good
enough for me!

Whale, hop in! You're heading into the ocean, right? I'll
take you!

Whale, thanks to a special layer of thin film, breathable air won't
be problem! Let me know when you want to return.
You should be careful, too. I'll take care of those Titans.
Hm? Inori, is something wrong?

No. I was just thinking how brave and dependable you sounded 
just now when you said, "I'll take care of those Titans."
Oh, uh... It just came out naturally...

It made me happy. It was almost like seeing Yuu... my little
brother, grow up...
But... I wonder why...

The way I feel right now... I can't really seem to put it
into words...
Inori...
Sorry for being weird. Never mind me!
Quit draggin' yer feet! Did you find the Current?
I knew it! It's gotta be near that village, then. What a pain...
Huh?
Boss.
...! You! You're alive?!
I thought ya already bit the dust.
Yer timin' is impeccable. We've gotta attack that village again.

Hurry up and get yer butt in gear. This show ain't
gettin' on the road till the Current is ours.
Boss... I was wondering if you'd reconsider.
Huh?
So, will you reconsider?
You know, like, not attack the village...?
Did you hit yer head or somethin'? You dare give ME orders?!

Lackeys like you ain't meant to use yer heads. Just do what
you're told, numbskull!
Look at this wound.

A Digimon at that village nursed me back to health and
healed it for me.
I can't see them as our enemy anymore...
I was hoping we could find a peaceful way of resolving things.
Boss, please. I'm begging you, here...
Lift up yer head.
I get what you're sayin'. Guess I have no other choice...
If it means that much to ya...

...then I don't need ya anymore. Traitors can die right here
where they stand.
B-Boss!
Divermon, get back!
Inori! {player}! We'll handle this, right?!
Damn it! What kind of freaks did ya bring with ya?!
Retreat for now! Fall back!
Well... I guess that worked out okay...
Yeah, but they didn't even consider my request...
I don't get it... Why are we doing all of this?!

An incompetent leader only increases the damage caused
by fighting...
That Digimon just now was certainly one such example.
The conflict in the Digital World will only get worse now.
And the future it'll bring about is the Shinjuku Inferno...
But that means there's still hope. You can stop it from happening.

Keep up the good work! Everything's riding on you,
Agent {player}.
I have to think of something reassuring to tell Shellmon...
Huh?! Where...?!
Look at this!

"The villagers talked, and we all decided we can't stay
here anymore. I'm going with them to make their medicines...

I'm worried about you, but I know you're a capable warrior.
You should be fine. I'll never forget our time together.

Take care. Know that somewhere in Iliad, I'll be praying
for you."
The village... What happened to the village?!
Let's go and see!
Where did everyone go?
I don't know, and I guess I shouldn't know... Not a Titan like me...
No, don't say that! We all shared—

...Yes, we shared the same ideals... for a short time,
at least.
Damn it! Why did this have to happen to such good Digimon?!
Hey, don't take it so hard...{next}
We'll see Shellmon again.{next}
I don't know what to say...{next}
That's right! I'm sure we'll see them again someday...

I know it's hard, but this doesn't necessarily mean we'll 
never see them again.
Come on. Try to cheer up a little...
Yeah, I guess you're right.

In the meantime, I think I'll stay here and protect this
place... For the villagers.
You should go back to doing what you need to do.
Thanks... for everything. I won't forget this.
Let's report all of this to Junomon.

War leaves the same horrible taste in your mouth, no
matter what world it's in...
This uproar will fester and continue to trigger other events.

I hope it doesn't fan even bigger flames of war, but knowing
what lies eight years in the future, I'm not too optimistic...

Damn it! There ain't nothin' the Titans want more than
control of the Current!
If the boss finds out about this blunder, it'll be our heads!

Now, let's get healed up and gather our strength and then
get back out there, you bilge rats!
Let's report about the Abyss Area to Junomon.
Thank you, Great Guardian Aegiomon.

Please continue to wield your might for the sake of the
Digital World.
Continue... For the Digital World...
You planning to stay here? {next}
You're not going back to human society? {next}
Will you be leaving us? {next}

Let's not talk about that right now. Aegiomon doesn't know
how to answer.
Inori...

Now, then. Tell me more about the conflict with the Titans,
if you would.
The Current... Are you certain that is what the Titans said?
The Current is the source of this world's power.

I imagine the Titans are plotting to take it for their own
and thereby expand their territory.

The Current flows outward in all directions from the World
Tree in the Gear Forest.

If the Current is truly what the Titans seek, then in all
likelihood their objective is—
The Gear Forest... right?

That is correct, Great Guardian Aegiomon. Could I ask you
to go to the Gear Forest next?

And humans... Now that we know the Titans are after the
Current, we must be even more careful about using the gate.

When the gate was opened three years ago during the clash
with the Titans, it affected both this world and your own.

There were human casualties in that incident, and some began to
bear a grudge against the Digimon because of it.
Three years ago? {next}
If there were human casualties, then... {next}
The accident your mother and little brother were involved in...?{next}
Yeah...
...I think we're talking about the same incident.

For that very reason, please understand that I cannot open
the gate until public order is restored.
We'll head to the Gear Forest with Aegiomon, then.
The gate can be opened once peace is restored, right?
And if it's true that the events of this world affect ours...
...then the problems of this world are our problems, too.
Yes. They are our problems...
...Very well.

The World Tree is at the center of the Current. You will find
the enemy's forces concentrated more than ever before.

Please be careful. I shall pray for your safety, Great Guardian
Aegiomon. And for yours as well, children of man...
